votes.reason: The Python code correctly implements the precondition and specification, checking list lengths and the element-wise absolute difference between the two lists.

The Python code correctly implements the precondition and specification, checking the lengths of the lists and verifying that each element in the result is the absolute difference of the corresponding elements in game and guess.
The Python code correctly implements the precondition and specification, checking length equality and the absolute difference of elements at each index.

The Python code correctly implements the Coq specification. The precondition checks length equality, and the spec checks: (1) game and guess have equal length, (2) result has the same length as game, and (3) for each valid index i, result[i] equals the absolute difference between game[i] and guess[i]. The Python implementation matches this exactly using len() for lengths and abs() for absolute value.

The Python code correctly implements the Coq specification. The precondition checks length equality, and the spec checks: (1) game and guess have equal length, (2) result has the same length as game, and (3) for each valid index i, result[i] equals the absolute difference between game[i] and guess[i]. The Python implementation matches this exactly using a loop over range(len(game)) and checking each element.

The Python code correctly implements the Coq specification. The precondition checks length equality, and the spec checks: (1) game and guess have equal length, (2) result has the same length as game, and (3) for each valid index i, result[i] equals the absolute difference between game[i] and guess[i]. The Python implementation matches this exactly using a loop over range(len(game)) and checking abs(game[i] - guess[i]).
Python checks equal lengths and enforces element-wise absolute difference exactly as the Coq spec; indexing and abs semantics match for all inputs.
Python checks equal lengths and ensures each result element equals the absolute difference of corresponding game and guess elements, matching the Coq spec on all inputs.
